Install PndTools and open your first PND archive.

PndTools is a .NET 10 library for reading and inspecting OpenPandora PND package files. It supports both SquashFS and ISO-based archives and exposes the embedded PXML metadata as typed .NET objects.

Parse PXML metadata

Section titled “Parse PXML metadata”
Validate PXML metadata against the schema and business rules.

PndTools provides two layers of validation: schema validation against the official PXML XSD, and a set of additional rules that the schema cannot express.

Schema validation

Section titled “Schema validation”

Additional rules

Section titled “Additional rules”

The schema cannot enforce constraints such as duplicate application IDs or malformed category combinations. NonSchemaEnforcableValidationExtensions adds these checks on top of a valid document.

Combining results

Section titled “Combining results”

Both validation steps return a ValidationResult, which can be chained or combined:
